title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy · Protocol Repair Bay
summary: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a valid focused agent skill and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.
Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.
Write imperative workflow steps, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and verification criteria.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
steps.instruction:
Use a changed debug case derived from this module: agent ext skill standard. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Skill Directory trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for create the required skill.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.

content.text: For Skill Directory, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Skill Directory precondition or invariant that the debug case must preserve.
Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed debug case derived from this module: agent ext skill standard. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A skill is a single prompt file stored anywhere.

stimulus.title: Skill Directory case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed debug case derived from this module: agent ext skill standard. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A skill is a single prompt file stored anywhere.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names. Artifact under review: a valid focused agent skill.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Skill Directory, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-portable-contract-63uat7: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Portable Contract into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-portable-contract-63uat7:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Portable Contract applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.
